chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: I think we can all agree that wasted time, gone forever, never to come back is awful.  And most people are afraid of that one mistake when they're cooking that takes all of their  time and effort and throws it out the window.  The problem is, nobody ever knows what that mistake is going to be until it happens.  Unless maybe you've worked in restaurants and you've had enough repetitions to know

text: I think we can all agree that wasted time, gone forever, never to come back is awful. And most people are afraid of that one mistake when they're cooking that takes all of their time and effort and throws it out the window. The problem is, nobody ever knows what that mistake is going to be until it happens. Unless maybe you've worked in restaurants and you've had enough repetitions to know what those mistakes are. And thankfully I have, so I'm going to be showing you the 50 mistakes that anybody can make that will ruin your food and the solutions to all of them. Our first and possibly most heinous mistake of the day.
